title: Golden Steak
description:
Why should vegetarians have all of the good food? Golden apples? Golden carrots? *pleh*
Have yourself a golden steak! :)
body:
# Introduction Why should vegetarians have all of the good food? Golden apples? Golden carrots? *pleh*
Have yourself a golden steak! :) # Content Admittedly, Golden Steak is a simple mod that was created to allow for Origins who are unable to eat vegetables to have a golden version of their food, adding the Golden Steak and the Enchanted Golden Steak. The Golden Steak is crafted the same way as a Golden Apple and the Enchanted Golden Steak is crafted using Gold Blocks in the same pattern. # Localisations/Translations Would you like to have Golden Steak translated into your language? Please submit your translation on the GitHub page and I'd be glad to add it! Currently Available - Brazilian Portuguese - BR -- Chronosacaria - Dutch - NL -- Chronosacaria - English - US -- Chronosacaria - English - GB -- Chronosacaria - French - FR -- Chronosacaria - German - DE -- der_klenki - Italian - IT -- Chronosacaria - Japanese - JP -- Chronosacaria - Korean - KR -- Chronosacaria - Latin - LA -- Chronosacaria (cause, why not?) - Polish - PL -- RDKRACZ (K0RR) - Portuguese - PT -- Chronosacaria - Simplified Chinese - ZH -- Chronosacaria - Spanish - ES -- Chronosacaria - Traditional Chinese - TW -- Chronosacaria # Patrons Without my patrons, I would not be able to devote as much time as I do to making these mods. ## Special thanks to - Deona (Custom) - 7z99 (Claymore) - EmmyAllEars (Claymore) - purejosh (Sword) - OnlyANeko (Sword) # FAQ - Q: Can I use your mod in my modpack? - A: Absolutely! I only ask that you provide a link back to this page. - Q: I've seen your mod on other sites. Did you post it and are they safe? - A: I have not, nor do I plan to, post my mod on any other sites than Modrinth, Curseforge or our GitHub page. If you have downloaded my mod from somewhere else, 1. It isn't from me and 2. It may have some kind of malicious files or have been modified in some way. I urge you to delete the file, run a full virus and malware scan and, if you want to use Golden Steak, come and download it on Modrinth, CurseForge or from GitHub. - Q. Forge? - A. By popular demand, this mod has been ported to Forge 1.16.5. Just go to files and you will find it there. :)
